en: Now at Iconium they entered together into the Jewish synagogue and spoke in such a way that a great number of both Jews and Greeks believed.
zh: 保羅和巴拿巴在以哥念照樣進猶太的會堂講道，結果一大群猶太人和希臘人都信了。

en: But the unbelieving Jews stirred up the Gentiles and poisoned their minds against the brothers.
zh: 但不順從的猶太人，煽動外族人，激起他們仇恨的心，來反對弟兄們。

en: So they remained for a long time, speaking boldly for the Lord, who bore witness to the word of his grace, granting signs and wonders to be done by their hands.
zh: 兩人卻仍住了很久，靠著主放膽講論，主也藉著他們的手行神蹟奇事，證實他恩惠的道。

en: But the people of the city were divided; some sided with the Jews and some with the apostles.
zh: 城裡眾人就分裂了，有的附從猶太人，也有的附從使徒。

en: When an attempt was made by both Gentiles and Jews, with their rulers, to mistreat them and to stone them,
zh: 當時，外族人、猶太人，和他們的首領，蠢蠢欲動，想要侮辱使徒，用石頭打他們。

en: they learned of it and fled to Lystra and Derbe, cities of Lycaonia, and to the surrounding country,
zh: 兩人知道了，就逃往呂高尼的路司得和特庇兩城，以及周圍的地方，

en: and there they continued to preach the gospel.
zh: 在那裡傳福音。

en: Now at Lystra there was a man sitting who could not use his feet. He was crippled from birth and had never walked.
zh: 路司得城有一個雙腳無力的人，坐在那裡。他生來就是瘸腿的，從來沒有走過路。

en: He listened to Paul speaking. And Paul, looking intently at him and seeing that he had faith to be made well,
zh: 他聽保羅講道；保羅注視他，見他有信心，可以治好，

en: said in a loud voice, "Stand upright on your feet." And he sprang up and began walking.
zh: 就大聲說：“你起來，兩腳站直！”他就跳起來，並且走起路來。

en: And when the crowds saw what Paul had done, they lifted up their voices, saying in Lycaonian, "The gods have come down to us in the likeness of men!"
zh: 眾人看見保羅所作的事，就用呂高尼話大聲說：“有神明成了人形，降到我們這裡來了！”

en: Barnabas they called Zeus, and Paul, Hermes, because he was the chief speaker.
zh: 於是他們稱巴拿巴為宙斯，稱保羅為漢密士，因為保羅帶頭講話。

en: And the priest of Zeus, whose temple was at the entrance to the city, brought oxen and garlands to the gates and wanted to offer sacrifice with the crowds.
zh: 城門前宙斯廟的祭司，牽著幾頭公牛，拿著一些花環來到門口，要同群眾一起獻祭。

en: But when the apostles Barnabas and Paul heard of it, they tore their garments and rushed out into the crowd, crying out,
zh: 巴拿巴和保羅兩個使徒聽見了，就撕裂衣服，跳進群眾中間，喊著說：

en: "Men, why are you doing these things? We also are men, of like nature with you, and we bring you good news, that you should turn from these vain things to a living God, who made the heaven and the earth and the sea and all that is in them.
zh: “各位，為甚麼這樣作呢？我們也是人，性情和你們一樣，我們傳福音給你們，正是要你們遠離這些虛妄的事，歸向永活的 神，就是那創造天、地、海和其中萬物的 神。

en: In past generations he allowed all the nations to walk in their own ways.
zh: 在從前的世代裡，他容忍萬國各行其道，

en: Yet he did not leave himself without witness, for he did good by giving you rains from heaven and fruitful seasons, satisfying your hearts with food and gladness."
zh: 然而卻未嘗不為自己留下明證，就如常常行善事，從天上降下雨來，常常賞賜豐年，使你們吃喝充足，滿心歡樂。”

en: Even with these words they scarcely restrained the people from offering sacrifice to them.
zh: 兩人說完了這些話，這才阻止群眾，不向他們獻祭。

en: But Jews came from Antioch and Iconium, and having persuaded the crowds, they stoned Paul and dragged him out of the city, supposing that he was dead.
zh: 但有些猶太人，從安提阿、以哥念來，挑唆群眾，用石頭打保羅，以為他死了，就拖到城外去。

en: But when the disciples gathered about him, he rose up and entered the city, and on the next day he went on with Barnabas to Derbe.
zh: 門徒正圍著他的時候，他竟然站起來，走進城裡去了。第二天，他跟巴拿巴一同到特庇去。

en: When they had preached the gospel to that city and had made many disciples, they returned to Lystra and to Iconium and to Antioch,
zh: 他們在那城裡傳福音，使許多人作了門徒，然後回到路司得、以哥念、安提阿，

en: strengthening the souls of the disciples, encouraging them to continue in the faith, and saying that through many tribulations we must enter the kingdom of God.
zh: 堅固門徒的心，勸他們恆守所信的道，又說：“我們進入 神的國，必須經歷許多苦難。”

en: And when they had appointed elders for them in every church, with prayer and fasting they committed them to the Lord in whom they had believed.
zh: 兩人在各教會為他們指派了長老；禁食祈禱之後，就把他們交託給所信的主。

en: Then they passed through Pisidia and came to Pamphylia.
zh: 兩人經過彼西底，來到旁非利亞，

en: And when they had spoken the word in Perga, they went down to Attalia,
zh: 在別加講道以後，就下到亞大利。

en: and from there they sailed to Antioch, where they had been commended to the grace of God for the work that they had fulfilled.
zh: 從那裡坐船往安提阿。從前眾人就是在這地方，把他們交託在 神的恩典中，派他們去工作，現在他們已經完成了。

en: And when they arrived and gathered the church together, they declared all that God had done with them, and how he had opened a door of faith to the Gentiles.
zh: 他們到了那裡，就召集了會眾，報告 神跟他們一起所行的一切，並且他為外族人開了信道的門。

en: And they remained no little time with the disciples.
zh: 兩人同門徒住了不少日子。
